steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank completes: "the Shatt al-Arab River delta is ______." The colon after the blank signals that what follows defines the blank word. That definition: "a constantly evolving network of channels and strips of land that change in size and shape." The word must mean something like constantly changing.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "dynamic": means characterized by constant change and activity. "The delta is dynamic" matches "constantly evolving" and "change in size and shape" exactly. ✓
  • "immutable": means unchanging, permanent. Directly contradicts the passage's statement that the delta changes constantly. ✗
  • "unrivaled": means having no equal. The passage makes no comparison between this delta and others — it says nothing about the delta being superior. ✗
  • "sustainable": means able to be maintained over time. The passage describes ongoing transformation, not long-term viability. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
